title: Single cell RNA-sequencing of human limbus

content: E-MTAB-11027 Single cell RNA-sequencing of human limbus RNA-seq of coding RNA from single cells EFO EFO_0005684 Homo sapiens To determine a comprehensive transcriptome sequencing profiling of all immune cell subset in cornea, we performed the single cell RNA-sequencing analysis on sort-purified
